title: Who's Got No Panties!?
overview: A show off girl named Aya ends up losing her panties somewhere and tries to steal panties from her classmate Konatsu before she's discovered.

title: The Hiccups Won't Stop
overview: Aya develops hiccups, so the others try to help cure them.

title: Executioner Girl & Demon King's Advent
overview: Aya is fearful of her older sister, Saya, and her gang leader boss, Kaname Oku.

title: First Kiss at the Pool!?
overview: As Aya's secret underwater plans are thwarted by Asuka Utsunomiya, she almost drowns and ends up having her first kiss taken by Kaname via CPR.

title: Utsonomiya's Cold Treatment
overview: When Aya gets sick with a cold, Asuka comes over to nurse her back to health in her own unique way.

title: Utsunomiya is Mysterious!!
overview: Aya comes up with a crazy scheme to try to get Asuka to smile.

title: Gokurakuin Girls' School Carnival
overview: Konatsu gets a lot of Matsuzaka beef, prompting Aya to have a yakiniku party which gets a few uninvited guests.

title: The Princess Descends!!
overview: A rich brat named Minami Kurihashi enrols into the high school, inadvertently picking a fight with Aya after cleaning up her hang out spot.

title: Forgetful Aya-chan
overview: Aya contracts amnesia after slipping on a banana skin, so the gang work together to try and bring back her memories.

title: Wet Bitch Showdown!!
overview: Aya misunderstands a conversation between Konatsu and Ai and gets into a heated debate with Minami about who's more 'appealing'.

title: Crazy Masquerade?
overview: The girls attend a masquerade ball where everyone besides Ai ends up under the influence of the 'juice' being served.

title: Farewell, Kurihashi!!
overview: Minami is due to return to LA, so the girls set off some fireworks to see her off.
